# 📄 LaTeX Project

This directory contains a LaTeX document compiled using **MiKTeX** and `latexmk`.

---

## 📁 Project Structure

### Core files
- `main.tex` — Main LaTeX source file  
- `main.pdf` — Generated output PDF (do not edit manually)

### Auxiliary files (auto-generated)
These files are created during compilation and can be safely ignored or deleted:

- `main.aux`
- `main.log`
- `main.fls`
- `main.fdb_latexmk`
- `main.synctex.gz`

---

## ⚙️ Build Instructions

### Recommended method (automatic dependency handling)

```bash
latexmk -pdf main.tex
